meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn about Power On Interio, an interior design company focused on premium residential and commercial spaces.

hero.title: An interior design company built around thoughtful spaces and reliable execution.
hero.paragraphOneSuffix: We focus on creating spaces that feel elegant, practical, and aligned with the people who use them every day.
hero.paragraphTwo: This website is now structured as a company profile, giving you a stronger foundation for trust, enquiries, and long-term SEO growth than a simple one-page portfolio.

approach.title: Design with clarity, detail, and a calm execution process.
